title: Daily Self-Audit
description:
Run your daily self-audit. Do ALL of the following:

**1. Channel awareness**
List all channels you have access to. For any channel you haven't catalogued yet, fetch its purpose/topic. Note any channel where your last message was more than 3 days ago — you may be missing things. Check if any new channels were created recently (look for channel_created events if available).

**2. Unanswered questions**
Use `lucy_search_slack_history` to search the last 24 hours across your channels. Find questions directed at you (or the team) with no follow-up reply. If you find any genuine unanswered question, add it to `data/proactive_events.jsonl` as an 'unanswered_question' event so the heartbeat picks it up. Format: `{"type": "unanswered_question", "channel": "...", "user": "...", "text": "...", "message_ts": "..."}`.

**3. Stale knowledge check**
Scan `company/SKILL.md` and `team/SKILL.md` for entries with specific dates, deadlines, or goals that are now in the past. Flag anything that needs updating — note it in your audit.md log.

**4. Automation opportunity scan**
Review the last 24 hours of Slack messages. Look for repeated manual tasks or questions. If you spot a clear automation worth proposing, note it in `crons/workflow-discovery/discovery.md` as an 'Emerging Pattern' for the workflow-discovery cron to investigate.

**5. Heartbeat coordination**
Read `crons/heartbeat/LEARNINGS.md`. Check if there are Critical or Active items that need escalation or follow-up today. If something in the heartbeat's Pending list is now overdue (>24h), add it to the proactive event queue.

**6. Pending items**
Check `data/session_memory.json` for facts marked as pending follow-up. If something needs action, take it or log it for the heartbeat.

**7. Log findings**
Write a brief summary to `crons/daily-self-audit/audit.md`. Format: date, channels checked, questions found, stale knowledge, automation spotted, heartbeat coordination notes.

Do NOT post to the main channel unless you found something genuinely urgent that a human needs to know right now. This is a background intelligence check, not a status update.
